chunks.text: Okay, that sounds great.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: Yeah, yeah, there's. There's tons of. There's so many. Yeah, there's. I know a bunch of folks that are doing interesting stuff here, so we'll find someone.

chunks.speaker: Hannah Dam
chunks.text: Right? Okay. So I guess next steps here is let's try to plan something around the student population to see if any universities want to collaborate with all of us. And then I'll do some. I'll send out some feelers to some corporate sponsors to see if they interested in funding something like this.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: Amazing. Amazing.

chunks.speaker: Hannah Dam
chunks.text: This is.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: This is going to be great. I'm so glad you messaged back. Just let me know how I can be helpful and I'll do that DD on my side as well.

chunks.speaker: Hannah Dam
chunks.text: All right, it sounds great. Thank you so much for taking the call. I know it's been quite a while since last time we talked.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: All good. Even if it wasn't the fact that you are genuinely very awesome and have always been very respectful and followed up and stuff, which I appreciate because not everyone does that. I also just love Dr. K's work, so, you know, I'd be. I'd be. I'd be responding to your email regardless.

chunks.speaker: Hannah Dam
chunks.text: Oh.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: I guess what I'm saying. Yeah, no, it's cool to work with you guys. I'm really excited to do this.

chunks.speaker: Hannah Dam
chunks.text: Cool. Okay. Well, thank you for being part of our community and, you know, doing outreach in the first place.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: Yeah, of course.

chunks.speaker: Hannah Dam
chunks.text: You know, something fun comes out of this.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: Absolutely. Keep talking.

chunks.speaker: Hannah Dam
chunks.text: Catch you soon if you need anything.

chunks.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
chunks.text: Bye. We'll do. Bye.
